infoAlert.title: Manage Dataset Templates
infoAlert.text: Create a template prefilled with metadata fields standard values, such as Author Affiliation, or add instructions in the metadata fields to give depositors more information on what metadata is expected.

emptyState: This collection has no dataset templates yet.

deleteModal.title: Delete Template
deleteModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this template? A new dataset will not be able to use this template.

alerts.deleteError: Something went wrong deleting the template. Try again later.

preview.title: Dataset Template Preview
preview.noMetadata: No citation metadata is available for this template.
preview.error: Unable to load the template preview. Try again later.
